text: Zone B update: water is rising near Riverside Lane. Two homes requesting evacuation support. Elderly residents present.
Route R2 through Riverside Lane is blocked by debris and standing water. Avoid for the next 4 hours.
Hill School shelter has 18 spaces, blankets available, needs drinking water by evening for Zone B evacuees.
Anika and Dev are available with a 4x4 from 5pm to 9pm for Zone B support. First-aid trained.
Depot has 40 water cans, 25 blankets, 12 first-aid kits. Driver available if Zone B route is confirmed.
Zone A field update: water rising near Canal Road. 25 residents need evacuation support, including elderly residents and two children.
Route R2 over Canal Bridge is blocked by overflow and debris. Route R4 via East Bypass is open for emergency vehicles to Zone A.
Hill School annex has 80 free beds, generator backup, and drinking water for Zone A evacuees tonight.
